calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

Unopposed Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND THROUGH DAVID CHIU, CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment And Permanent Injunction.

Plaintiff The People of California's Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment And Permanent Injunction, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, the court will execute the order portion of the [Proposed] Final Judgment and Injunction, filed as Exhibit C to the Eliasoph Declaration and file the executed stipulation and order. The People are ordered to submit a proposed order identical to this tentative consistent with Local Rule 8.3(G).

Order and consnet judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
